about-section.about-intro:
Hi, my name is Maploop
...and I enjoy creating things that live on the internet.

I have extensive experience with Minecraft development and building large-scale multiplayer experiences, including an open source Hypixel SkyBlock recreation that has gained hundreds of stars on GitHub.

My journey in software development began back in late 2019, when I decided I wanted to make my own Minecraft plugin for the first time. Since then, I've had the opportunity to manage my own dev team of over 10,
work for the largest Minecraft server in Iran,
deliver over 50 freelance projects and
Lead the largest community-driven re-creation of Hypixel SkyBlock at Atlas Network.

I have also recently worked on a variety of Open Source Projects.
about-section.about-tech-intro: Here are a few of the technologies I've worked with recently:

job-atlas.job-atlas-title: Lead Maintainer @ Swofty Developments (formerly Atlas)
job-atlas.job-atlas-description:
• Communicated and managed a developer team of ~8
  • Wrote modern, performant, maintainable code for internal projects
  • Founded and contribute extensively to the largest community driven re-creation of Hypixel SkyBlock
  • Contributed extensively to AtlasRedisAPI, a Java library aimed to make utilizing Redis messaging systems easier

job-lunamc.job-lunamc-description:
• Was solely responsible for the design, development, and implementation of the entire project adhering to professional industry standards.
  • Developped performant, and scalable products optimized for large player bases
  • Worked with a variety of different frameworks and content management systems such as Redis, MongoDB, Spring, NMS, etc.

job-trexmine.job-trexmine-description:
• Collaborated effectively within a team of over 10 skilled professionals.
  • Contributed to the project's internal "Nick System"

project-1.project1-description: The best commercial Hypixel SkyBlock Sandbox / Recreation currently available. Contains Gemstones, 70% of Hypixels Items, Dwarven Mines, Guilds, Auction House, NPC shops, Quests, Islands, Bazaar and just about everything else!
project-1.project1-tech: Spigot Library Advanced NMS Java Cloudflare (Anti-DDOS)

project-2.project2-description: A simple yet scalable game engine using OpenGL which I am developping foundational framework, with the primary goal of using it to practice and experiment with various concepts in computer physics and real-time simulations.

projects-section.youtube-note: Showcases of my work in Atlas Network can be found on my YouTube.

events-section.events-section-title: 04. Events I've Been a Part Of

event-1.event1-description:
• Took part in the 6th SPACE national student programming competition at Sajjad University
  • Solved algorithmic questions as part of a team
  • Came out 7th between 43 other competing teams from all over Iran

contact-section.contact-description:
Whether it's for an opportunity, a question, or a freelance request, my inbox is always open.
Even if you just want to say hi, I’ll try my best to get back to you!
